name: Segway Seat F/D Series with Bag

features.General Features: Ergonomic Comfort: Padded seat ensures a more comfortable ride, reducing fatigue on longer commutes. | Adjustable Design: Users can modify the seat height for an optimal riding position. | Sturdy Build: Made with durable aluminum alloy, providing a stable and safe riding experience. | Detachable Storage Bag: Ideal for carrying personal items such as wallets, keys, or small gadgets. | Easy Installation: Simple mounting system with all necessary tools included.
features.What’s in the box?: 1x Segway Seat for Ninebot KickScooter F Series | 1x Detachable Storage Bag | 1x Installation Toolkit | 1x Instruction Manual
